sections.paragraph:
m. adj. (from the root נָעַם).-

(1) pleasant, agreeable, Psa 133:1 used of a song, Psa 147:1 the harp, Psal. 81:3 of one beloved, Son 1:16. Plur. נְעִימִים pleasant things, i.e. pleasures, Job 36:11, and נְעִימֹות Psa 16:11.

(2) pleasant (as to place); plur. נִעִימִים pleasant places, Psa 16:6.

(3) benign, generous to any one, Psa 135:3 comp. נֹעַם Psa 90:17.
